category_sources: Official Opus development page describes opus-tools as tools for encoding and decoding Opus to and from WAV.
source_facts.description says opus-tools provides utilities to encode, inspect, and decode .opus files.
display_name_sources: Official Opus documentation and development pages use the name Opus-tools.
docs_sources: Official Opus development page documents opus-tools and links its manpages.
Official Opus documentation has an Opus-tools man-pages section.
repo_sources: Official Opus development page lists the opus-tools git clone URL as https://gitlab.xiph.org/xiph/opus-tools.git.
source_facts.repo is empty, so repo was investigated.
tags_sources: Official Opus development page describes opus-tools as encoding/decoding tools.
source_facts.description names .opus encode, inspect, and decode utilities.
